versions.version_description: Credit to "Easy 2 Play Guitar Tutorials" on Youtube, just thought it woul dbe helpful to have the tab on here instead of just on Youtube.
Multiple different chords added to match the song better.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro] 
[ch]Fmaj7[/ch]         [ch]Asus2/E[/ch]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Cmaj7/G[/ch]
Ooh, ooh[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]Asus2/E[/ch]
My last made me feel like I would never try again[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                          [ch]Cmaj7/G[/ch]
But when I saw you, I felt something I never felt[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]Asus2/E[/ch]
Come closer, I'll give you all my love[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                          [ch]Cmaj7/G[/ch]
If you treat me right, baby, I'll give you everything[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]Asus2/E[/ch]
My last made me feel like I would never try again[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                          [ch]Cmaj7/G[/ch]
But when I saw you, I felt something I never felt[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]Asus2/E[/ch]
Come closer, I'll give you all my love[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                          [ch]Cmaj7/G[/ch]
If you treat me right, baby, I'll give you everything[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]         [ch]Asus2/E[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Cmaj7/G[/ch]
Talk to me, I need to hear you need me like I need ya[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]         [ch]Asus2/E[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Cmaj7/G[/ch]
Fall for me, I wanna know you feel how I feel for you, love[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]         [ch]Asus2/E[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Cmaj7/G[/ch]
Before you, baby, I was numb, drown out pain by pourin' up[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]         [ch]Asus2/E[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Cmaj7/G[/ch]
Speedin' fast on the run, never wanna get caught up[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]         [ch]Asus2/E[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Cmaj7/G[/ch]
Now you're the one that I'm callin'[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]         [ch]Asus2/E[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Cmaj7/G[/ch]
Swore I thought I'd never fall again, don't think I'm just talkin'[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]         [ch]Asus2/E[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Cmaj7/G[/ch]
I think I might go all in, no exceptions, girl, I need ya[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]         [ch]Asus2/E[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Cmaj7/G[/ch]
Feeling like I'm out of my mind, 'cause I can't get enough[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]         [ch]Asus2/E[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Cmaj7/G[/ch]
Only one that I give my time, 'cause I got eyes for ya[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]         [ch]Asus2/E[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Cmaj7/G[/ch]
Might make an exception for ya, 'cause I been feelin' ya[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]         [ch]Asus2/E[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Cmaj7/G[/ch]
Think I might be out of my mind, I think that you're the one[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]Asus2/E[/ch]
My last made me feel like I would never try again[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                          [ch]Cmaj7/G[/ch]
But when I saw you, I felt something I never felt[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]Asus2/E[/ch]
Come closer, I'll give you all my love[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                          [ch]Cmaj7/G[/ch]
If you treat me right, baby, I'll give you everything[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]Asus2/E[/ch]
My last made me feel like I would never try again[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                          [ch]Cmaj7/G[/ch]
But when I saw you, I felt something I never felt[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]Asus2/E[/ch]
Come closer, I'll give you all my love[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                          [ch]Cmaj7/G[/ch]
If you treat me right, baby, I'll give you everything[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                [ch]Asus2/E[/ch]
Will never give my all again[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                   [ch]Cmaj7/G[/ch]
'Cause I'm sick of falling down[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                [ch]Asus2/E[/ch]
When I open up and give my trust[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]Cmaj7/G[/ch]
They find a way to break it down[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                [ch]Asus2/E[/ch]
Break down[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]Cmaj7/G[/ch]
Tear me up inside[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                [ch]Asus2/E[/ch]
When you break me down[/tab]
